title: lepisorus contortus
intro: Lepisorus contortus, also known as the twisted fern or contorted maidenhair spleenwort, is a species of fern in the family Aspleniaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Lepisorus contortus include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it can also be used in tincture or ointment form for topical applications.
